templates.name: Do you offer free returns ?
templates.content:
We offer free returns on US orders over $100. For orders under $100, the $9.95 shipping fee is non-refundable for returns.

For more information, see our Return Policy here: https://sijo.attn.tv/aIuV3G1jbdtZ.

templates.name: How do I wash or care for my sheets?
templates.content: You can check out our care guide on how to properly take care of our sheetS: https://sijo.attn.tv/axJR0LGCdPfA

templates.name: Size Chart: Men - Clothes
templates.content: You can take a look at our men's size chart here: https://sijohome.com/pages/eucalyptus-loungewear-size-chart

templates.name: Why is the flat sheet in the sheet set offered as an upsell option?
templates.content: Our sheet set has the option to get the flat sheet or not, and it's always an option we have on the website as some customers only want the fitted sheet with the pillowcases and not with the flat.

templates.name: Which of your pajamas/loungewear is the softest?
templates.content: We recommend our SoftStrech collection if you're looking for a set that is super soft and cozy. Our FineSlumber collection is more sleek and the fabric feels closer to our AiryWeight bedding.

templates.name: Which bedding collection is your top seller?
templates.content: Our AiryWeight collection is our best-selling bedding due to its cool-to-the-touch feel, luxurious texture, and healthy properties.

templates.name: Military / First responder / Healthcare / Teacher discount
templates.content: Thank you for your service! We don't have any specific discounts like that, but if it helps, you can check out the items we have on sale here: https://sijohome.com/collections/clearance

templates.name: Brand ambassador / sponsorship
templates.content: Thank you for your interest! You can sign up for our ambassador program here: https://sijo.grin.live/

templates.name: Wholesale inquiries
templates.content: Thank you for your interest! The best way to discuss wholesale is to email us directly at care@sijohome.com. Our team is happy to chat.

templates.name: Cancel / edit order
templates.content: I can check if that's possible. What's the order number and the change you'd like to make?

templates.name: Customer support
templates.content: The best way to handle this is to email us directly at care@sijohome.com, live chat with one of our agents via the website or give us a call at 1-833-937-2497. Our team is happy to help!

templates.name: Social media
templates.content: Give us a follow on IG: https://www.instagram.com/sijohome/ and FB here: https://www.facebook.com/sijohome/

templates.name: Do you price match a sale?
templates.content: Items purchased at full price within 3 days of going on sale are eligible for a refund for the difference in price. Refunds will be applied to your original payment method within 10 business days.

templates.name: Phone support
templates.content: You can give us a call at 1-833-937-2497 or let me know if I can help via text, it may be faster.

templates.name: Rewards / referral
templates.content: We have a referral program where you can give 3 of your friends 20% off their first purchase plus free shipping, and you'll get a $100 Amazon Gift Card. Check it out here - https://sijohome.com/pages/get-100-referral-program

templates.name: Return policy
templates.content: You can check out our detailed return policy here: https://sijohome.com/pages/return-and-shipping

templates.name: How do I start a return?
templates.content: You can start your return here: https://sijohome.com/apps/returns

templates.name: What's the weight of your CLIMA and Eucalyptus comforters?
templates.content: The weight of our CLIMA and Eucalyptus Comforters are the same. Our full/queen are 6lbs, and king/calking are 8lbs.

templates.name: Can you apply a code or offer retroactively
templates.content: Unfortunately, discount codes can't be honored once an order is already placed. Sorry for the inconvenience.

templates.name: Can I include a gift receipt with my order?
templates.content: We don't offer separate gift receipts at this time. All orders arrive with a packing slip that omits the price of each item.

templates.name: Store location / retailer
templates.content: We don't currently have a store but definitely keep an eye out.

templates.name: Shipping time
templates.content: All in-stock orders are processed within 24-48 business hours. Shipping time itself is dependent on the speed at which you've ordered. Most standard orders will process and arrive within 5-8 business days.

templates.name: Size Chart: All - Clothes
templates.content: You can take a look at our size chart here: https://sijohome.com/pages/eucalyptus-bedding-size-chart

templates.name: Sales Collection
templates.content: You can take a look at our sale collection here: https://sijohome.com/collections/clearance

templates.name: Size Chart: Women - Clothes
templates.content: You can take a look at our women's size chart here: https://sijohome.com/pages/eucalyptus-loungewear-size-chart

templates.name: Which carrier do you use for shipping?
templates.content: Shipping carriers like USPS, UPS, and FedEx, whichever is available, will deliver the order to you.

templates.name: Free shipping
templates.content: We offer free standard shipping on domestic orders over $100 (excluding Hawaii). Maybe you can add something else to reach the minimum?
